title: jasminum kwangense
intro: Jasminum kwangense, also known as the Kwangsi jasmine or Kwangtze jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It is an evergreen climber native to southern China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Jasminum kwangense include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant is often prepared as a tea or dried flower infusion for its herbal benefits, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
